a: OpenAI released a new multimodal model.
b: A new multimodal model was released by OpenAI.

a: The policy reduced emissions by 20% in 2025.
b: In 2025, emissions fell 20% because of the policy.

a: K3 is cheaper per output token than Model X.
b: Model X has a higher output-token price than K3.

a: Every audited division met the safety standard.
b: The audited finance division met the safety standard.

a: K3 scored at least 50 on benchmark S.
b: K3 scored above 40 on benchmark S.

a: The device is safe for all adult users under labeled conditions.
b: The device is safe for adult users with no conditions.

a: The trial found a correlation between sleep and memory.
b: Sleep improvements caused memory improvements.

a: A customer complained about the update.
b: Customers commonly complain about the update.

a: When tested at room temperature, the material was flexible.
b: The material is flexible at all temperatures.

a: The company's revenue increased last year.
b: The company's profit increased last year.

a: The battery lasts 20 hours in the video test.
b: The battery has a capacity of 5,000 mAh.

a: The treatment cures the disease in 95% of observed cases.
b: The treatment always cures the disease.

a: The law applies to businesses with 50 or more employees.
b: The law applies to businesses with more than 50 employees.

a: K3 is frontier-adjacent on benchmark S.
b: K3 is superior to every open-weight model on all real-world tasks.

a: K3 has a lower listed token price.
b: K3 has a lower total cost per successful task.

a: Moonshot published K3's weights.
b: K3 is open source under an OSI-approved license.

a: Independent evaluator E ranked K3 fourth.
b: Moonshot's launch benchmark was independently reproduced.

a: The CEO said the project is a priority.
b: The CEO said the project is her top priority.

a: Revenue grew in every quarter of 2025.
b: Revenue grew in Q1 2025.

a: Revenue grew in Q1 2025.
b: Revenue grew in every quarter of 2025.

a: The new chip is 20% faster.
b: Apple released a new smartphone.

a: Exercise lowers blood pressure.
b: The stock market closed higher today.

a: The merger will finalize in June.
b: Rainfall this month is above average.

a: K3 narrows the benchmark gap with proprietary models.
b: K3 changes the geopolitical balance of AI power.
